title: [codereview-pass2] Kconfig select LICHEN_SCHC added to CCP16 but verify if TDMA init depends on SCHC rules
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/Kconfig:128 - TDMA config should also select LICHEN_SCHC explicitly for future multi-channel beacon frames that use SCHC rule for DIO extensions. Current change is chunk 1/3. Pass 1 of 3.
close_reason: Added explicit  to LICHEN_TDMA in lichen/subsys/lichen/link/Kconfig (chunk 1/3). Ensures dependency for multi-channel beacon DIO SCHC rules. Commit b4fe5ea1c.
